hooks.command: W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/diagnostics-lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/rtk-bootstrap.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" rtk-optimizer SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/diagnostics-lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/rtk-healthcheck.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" rtk-optimizer SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
